title: FiveSeasonStuff 2 Long Stems Real Touch Hydrangea Artificial Flowers Ethereal Amethyst (Soft Lavender) Lifelike, Elegant, and Versatile Decor for Any Occasion
features: Lifelike Appearance. Delicately handmade to capture every detail, these artificial faux hydrangeas look incredibly real and feel natural to the touch, thanks to advanced Real Touch technology.

Are as close to live hydrangea flowers as possible with 1:1 size ratio to real hydrangeas; we even made the stems look more lifelike for a more luxurious bouquet. Enjoy all year long just like dried hydrangea flowers.
Elegant and Tall. Each realistic blossom stem measures 1.7 feet (53 cm) long, ideal for tall vases and grand silk arrangements.

Versatile Decoration. Great for centerpieces, home or office decor, bouquets, table flower decoration, living room table, party decor, or DIY projects. These false hydrangeas are beautiful on their own or mixed with other fake flowers, adding a sophisticated touch to any setting.
Premium Packaging Gift Ready. Comes with two bendable stems, carefully sealed in FiveSeasonStuff branded packaging for protection and quality assurance.
Hassle-Free Beauty. Enjoy the enduring beauty of these hydrangeas without the need for maintenance. Perfect for home decor, weddings, and special events, they bring lasting elegance to any space.
description: Enhance your decor with these Real Touch Hydrangea flowers, expertly crafted to replicate the beauty and feel of real hydrangeas. Each set includes two tall stems with lush, light lavender blooms and vibrant green leaves. Perfect for any occasion, these lifelike flowers bring elegance and charm to your space. Why Choose Real Touch Hydrangea Flowers? All-Year Appeal: Perfect for any season, from spring to winter, making them a versatile addition to your home. Ideal for Various Settings: Enhance your office, dining table, coffee table, hallway, foyer, living room, or kitchen with these stunning blooms. Thoughtful Gifts: These hydrangeas make beautiful, lasting gifts for friends and family on any occasion.
